name: prd-analysis-suite
description: Detachable PRD analysis skill suite for source normalization, user analysis, competitor gaps, scenario ranking, and MVP scope decisions.

interface.shortDescription: Detachable PRD analysis skills for PM workflows.
interface.longDescription: A detachable suite of governed PRD analysis skills that can normalize raw inputs, map users, analyze needs, compare competitors, rank scenarios, and decide MVP scope without depending on the host project.
defaultPrompt: Map target users for this product idea.
Analyze competitor gaps before MVP scoping.
Rank scenarios by low cost and high user value.
